query:
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name,
  u.phone,
  u.roles,
  p.id as partner_id,
  p.name as partner_name,
  p.isActive as partner_is_active
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN partners p ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%重庆%' OR p.name LIKE '%重庆%';
